meaning: n.[动]海扇类,海扇壳,小舟,[植]麦仙翁vi.弄皱,折皱,起皱vt.使皱
examples: In the middle was a small round pond containing gold-fish and surrounded by a cockle-shell border.
Cockle the paper to make a flower.
Notices have been erected along the estuary warning people cockle picking has been banned.
The one at Newcastle University's farm, Cockle Park, in Morpeth, Northumberland is the most north-westerly in Europe.
